nasb.text: So Gehazi pursued Naaman. When Naaman saw one running after him, he came down from the chariot to meet him and said, “Is all well?”

esv.text: So Gehazi followed Naaman. And when Naaman saw someone running after him, he got down from the chariot to meet him and said, “Is all well?”

cnv.text: 於是基哈西追趕乃縵。乃縵看見有人追上來，就下車迎著他，說：“平安嗎？”

ccb.text: 他便去追赶乃缦。乃缦见后面有人赶来，就下车迎接他，问他：“一切都好吗？”
